name: voxpilot
description: Talk to your IDE coding assistant. On-device voice transcription powered by Moonshine ASR. No API keys, no cloud, just your voice.

commands.title: VoxPilot: Inline Voice Input (Insert at Cursor)
VoxPilot: Send Last Transcript to Chat

enumDescriptions: Whisper Large v3 Turbo (~1.6GB) — best accuracy, 90+ languages
voxpilot.model.description: ASR model to use. Moonshine models are English-only and lightweight. Whisper models support 90+ languages with increasing accuracy and size. Parakeet TDT offers streaming low-latency transcription for English.

voxpilot.vadSensitivity.description: Voice activity detection threshold. Lower = more sensitive.

voxpilot.autoSendToChat.description: Automatically send completed transcripts to the active chat participant.

voxpilot.targetChatParticipant.description: Chat participant ID to send voice input to (e.g. 'github.copilot'). Leave empty for default.

voxpilot.silenceTimeout.description: Milliseconds of silence before finalizing a transcript segment.

voxpilot.maxSpeechDuration.description: Maximum speech duration in seconds before auto-transcribing. Moonshine works best under 15s; increase for longer dictation at the cost of accuracy.

voxpilot.audioDevice.description: Audio input device ID. Leave empty for system default. Use 'VoxPilot: Select Audio Input Device' to pick one.

voxpilot.soundFeedback.description: Play subtle beep sounds when voice input starts and stops.

voxpilot.inlineMode.description: When enabled, transcripts are inserted directly at the cursor position instead of being sent to chat. Toggle per-session with 'VoxPilot: Inline Voice Input'.

voxpilot.noiseGateThreshold.description: Noise gate RMS threshold (0–0.1). Audio frames below this level are silenced before reaching VAD. 0 = disabled. Try 0.005–0.02 to filter fan/hum noise.

voxpilot.voiceLevelIndicator.description: Show a numeric dB level in the status bar while recording. Displays real-time voice activity level in dBFS. Overridden when waveform visualization is enabled.

voxpilot.waveformVisualization.description: Show an animated mini waveform (▁▂▃▅▇) in the status bar while recording, replacing the numeric dB display. Disable to fall back to numeric dB or plain text.

voxpilot.language.description: Transcription language (ISO 639-1 code). 'auto' enables auto-detection on Whisper models. Ignored for English-only models (Moonshine, Parakeet). Use 'VoxPilot: Select Transcription Language' for a picker UI.

voxpilot.outputAction.description: Default action for completed transcripts. 'ask' shows a notification with all options.

voxpilot.partialOverlay.description: Show a floating live-caption overlay in the editor while speaking. Displays partial transcripts in real time, like live captions.

voxpilot.autoCapitalize.description: Automatically capitalize the first letter of every transcript.

voxpilot.codeVocabulary.description: Correct common ASR misrecognitions of programming terms (e.g. "java script" → "JavaScript", "camel case" → "camelCase"). Disable if you prefer raw transcription output.

from.description: Spoken or misrecognized form to match (case-insensitive, word-boundary matched).

voxpilot.customVocabulary.markdownDescription:
Add your own word corrections and aliases on top of the built-in code vocabulary. User entries take priority over built-in rules.

Example:
```json
[
  { "from": "my lib", "to": "MyLib" },
  { "from": "k eight s", "to": "Kubernetes" },
  { "from": "react query", "to": "TanStack Query" }
]
```

Phrases are matched case-insensitively at word boundaries. Longer phrases match first.

voxpilot.autoPunctuation.description: Automatically add a period at the end of transcripts that don't already end with punctuation. Uses speech pause patterns (silence timeout) as a natural sentence boundary signal.

voxpilot.autoSubmitChat.description: Legacy: auto-submit transcripts in chat panels. Prefer autoSubmitRules for per-target control.
voxpilot.autoSubmitChat.deprecationMessage: Use voxpilot.autoSubmitRules instead for per-target auto-submit control.

chat.description: Auto-press Enter after sending transcript to a chat panel.

cursor.description: Auto-press Enter after inserting transcript at cursor position.

clipboard.description: Auto-paste from clipboard after copying transcript (experimental).

voxpilot.autoSubmitRules.description: Per-target auto-submit rules. Controls whether VoxPilot auto-presses Enter after delivering a transcript to each output target. Chat defaults to on (submit immediately), cursor and clipboard default to off (insert only).

order.description: Ordered list of post-processor IDs. Default: [voiceCommands, stitchSegments, autoPunctuation, autoCapitalize].

disabled.description: List of post-processor IDs to disable.

voxpilot.postProcessors.description: Transcript post-processing pipeline configuration. Use the command "VoxPilot: Post-Processing Pipeline Settings" to reorder and toggle processors interactively, or edit directly. Built-in processors: stitchSegments, trim, normalizeWhitespace, voiceCommands, customVoiceCommands, fixTypos, codeVocabulary, autoPunctuation, autoCapitalize.

phrase.description: Spoken phrase to match (case-insensitive, word-boundary matched).

action.description: Action type: 'insert' replaces the phrase with text, 'command' executes a VS Code command.

text.description: Replacement text for 'insert' actions. Supports \n (newline) and \t (tab) escapes.

command.description: VS Code command ID for 'command' actions (e.g. 'editor.action.formatDocument').

args.description: Optional arguments passed to the VS Code command.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of what this command does.

voxpilot.customVoiceCommands.markdownDescription:
Define custom voice-to-action mappings. Each entry maps a spoken phrase to an action.

Example:
```json
[
  { "phrase": "arrow function", "action": "insert", "text": "() => " },
  { "phrase": "hash map", "action": "insert", "text": "HashMap" },
  { "phrase": "format file", "action": "command", "command": "editor.action.formatDocument" }
]
```

Phrases are matched case-insensitively at word boundaries. Longer phrases match first. Insert actions run in the post-processing pipeline; command actions execute the VS Code command and strip the phrase from the transcript.
